path: 05 Projects/2026-02 AAS Infrastruktur/AAS Infrastruktur - Use Cases.pdf
text:
# Page 1^page=1
AAS Infrastruktur - Use CasesDefinitionsDigital Product Passport (DPP)Digital Product Passport means a set of data specific to a product that includes theinformation ... and that is accessible via electronic means through a data carrier ...- Regulation (EU) 2024/1781Data carrierData carrier means a linear barcode symbol, a two-dimensional symbol or otherautomatic identification data capture medium that can be read by a device- Regulation (EU) 2024/1781Unique product identifierUnique product identifier means a unique string of characters for the identification of aproduct that also enables a web link to the Digital Product Passport- Regulation (EU) 2024/1781CustomerCustomer means a natural or legal person that purchases, hires or receives a productfor their own use whether or not acting for purposes which are outside their trade,business, craft or profession- Regulation (EU) 2024/1781Model / Batch / Item vs. Type / Batch / InstanceThe term model usually refers to a version of a product of which all units share the sametechnical characteristics relevant for the ecodesign requirements and the same modelidentifier, the term batch usually refers to a subset of a specific model composed of allproducts produced in a specific manufacturing plant at a specific moment in time and theterm item usually refers to a single unit of a model.- Regulation (EU) 2024/1781In the context of the Asset Administration Shell there is Enumeration for denoting whether anasset is a type asset or an instance asset or a batch asset

# Page 2^page=2
Information levelRegulation (EU) 2024/1781AAS assetKindIDTA 01001 - Specification of the Asset Administration Shell Part 1: MetamodelModelTypeBatchBatchItemInstance: Comparison between EU information level and AAS assetKindAsset Administration Shell (AAS)The Asset Administration Shell (AAS) is an interoperable implementation of the digitaltwin. It is standardized in IEC 63278 series. As a digital representation of an asset (e.g.component, device, machine, plant) over its entire life cycle, it acts as the "life cycle file" ofan asset and is therefore the linchpin in the value creation system.The Asset Administration Shell (AAS) is the European industry’s solution for an interoperableand machine-readable data format for the Digital Product Passport required by the EU.Asset Administration Shell ViewAn Asset Administration Shell View is a web page that displays the information of anAsset Administration Shell (AAS) according to the structure/hierarchy of the AAS metamodel.This view is generally suitable for AAS experts who are familiar with the structure/hierarchyof the AAS metamodel as well as various Submodels. Normal customers without AASknowledge may not find the information they are looking for.Digital Product Passport ViewA Digital Product Passport View is a web page that displays the information of an AssetAdministration Shell (AAS) regardless of the structure/hierarchy of the AAS metamodel. Thisview is suitable for customers without AAS knowledge as well as AAS experts. The data ofthe AAS is presented in a user-friendly and easy-to-understand structure.User Stories (What?)US01 Accessing Digital Product Passport View via Product DetailPage (Type level)CUS01 Customer User StoryAs a HARTING customerI want a solution on product detail pages in the HARTING eShopso that I can access product's Digital Product Passport View.

# Page 3^page=3
US02 Accessing Digital Product Passport View via scanningQR Code (Batch level)US03 Downloading AASHUS01 HARTING User StoryAs HARTINGI want to provide Digital Product Passports for all HARTING product listed in theHARTING eShop (type level)so that HARTING customers can access DPPs via a link on the corresponding productdetail page.HARTING Project DE25-402 - Long Batch & Digital Nameplate for Pilot ProductlinesCUS02 Customer User StoryAs a HARTING Customer,I want to scan a QR Code of a HARTING Product with my mobile phoneso that I can access the product’s Digital Product Passport View.HUS02 HARTING User StoryAs HARTINGI want to provide Digital Product Passports for selected HARTING product lines onbatch levelso that HARTING customers can access DPPs via scanning QR Codes, which aplaced in selected HARTING product lines (e.g. Green Line)CUS03 Customer User StoryAs a HARTING customerI want a solutionso that I can download HARTING AAS as file.- AAS Type 1 = AASX Package (IDTA 01005 - Specification of the Asset AdministrationShell Part 5: Package File Format (AASX))HUS03 HARTING User Story

# Page 4^page=4
US04 Accessing HARTING AAS via API EndpointUS05 Using HARTING AAS via Siemens TeamcenterAs HARTINGI want to provide AASX Package files (type level)so that HARTING customers can download HARTING AAS as files.- AAS Type 1 = AASX Package (IDTA 01005 - Specification of the Asset AdministrationShell Part 5: Package File Format (AASX))CUS04 Customer User StoryAs a HARTING customerI want a solution to get AAS API endpointso that I can use this API endpoint in my specific software solution to access HARTINGAAS.- AAS Type 2 = API (IDTA 01002 - Specification of the Asset Administration Shell Part 2:Application Programming Interfaces)HUS04 HARTING User StoryAs HARTINGI want to provide AAS endpoints (type)so that HARTING customers can access HARTING AAS via API.- AAS Type 2 = API (IDTA 01002 - Specification of the Asset Administration Shell Part 2:Application Programming Interfaces)CUS05 Customer User Story written by SiemensHUS05 HARTING User StoryAs HARTINGI want to provide AASso that HARTING customers can found, use and import HARTING AAS in SiemensTeamcenter.- linked to US04 Accessing HARTING AAS via API Endpoint

# Page 5^page=5
US06 Using HARTING AAS in EPLAN software solutionsUS07 Generating Asset Administration Shells (Type level)US08 Generating Asset Administration Shells (Batch level)US07 AAS distribution via Data SpacesCUS06 Customer User Story written by EPLANHUS06 HARTING User StoryAs HARTINGI want to provide AASso that HARTING customers can found, use and import HARTING AAS in EPLANSoftware solutions.- linked to US04 Accessing HARTING AAS via API EndpointHUS07 HARTING User StoryAs HARTINGI want to generate Asset Administration Shell for all HARTING products (type level)so that these can be provided to customers.- see US01 Accessing Digital Product Passport View via Product Detail Page (Typelevel)HUS08 HARTING User StoryAs HARTINGI want to generate Asset Administration Shell for all selected products lines (batchlevel)so that these can be provided to customers.- see US02 Accessing Digital Product Passport View via scanning QR Code (Batchlevel)HUS07 HARTING User StoryAs HARTINGI want to provide Asset Administration Shell for all HARTING products (type level)

# Page 6^page=6
so that these can be accessed via Data Spaces.- linked to US04 Accessing HARTING AAS via API Endpoint
